question: A train travels 60 km in 1.5 hours. What is its average speed in km/h?
If a shirt costs 20 dollars and is discounted by 25 percent, what is the sale price in dollars?
Natalia sold 48 clips in April and half as many in May. How many clips did she sell in total?
There are 3 boxes with 12 apples each. If 10 apples are removed in total, how many apples remain?
A tank holds 200 liters and is 40 percent full. How many liters are in the tank?
If today is Wednesday, what day of the week will it be in 10 days?
A rectangle is 8 cm long and 5 cm wide. What is its area in square centimeters?
Sam reads 15 pages a day. How many pages does he read in 2 weeks?
If 5 workers build a wall in 6 days, how many worker-days does the wall take?
A number doubled and then increased by 3 equals 11. What is the number?
A car travels 150 km in 3 hours. What is its average speed in km/h?
A book costs 40 dollars and is discounted by 10 percent. What is the sale price in dollars?
There are 5 bags with 8 marbles each. How many marbles are there in total?
A class has 30 students and 60 percent are girls. How many girls are there?
If 4 pens cost 8 dollars, how much do 7 pens cost in dollars?
A rectangle is 12 m long and 4 m wide. What is its perimeter in meters?
A square has a side of 9 cm. What is its area in square centimeters?
Tom has 3 times as many apples as Jerry. Jerry has 7. How many apples does Tom have?
If today is Monday, what day of the week will it be in 5 days?
A worker earns 15 dollars per hour for 8 hours. What are the total earnings in dollars?
A jug holds 2 liters. If you pour out 750 ml, how many ml remain?
Half of a number is 26. What is the number?
A triangle has a base of 10 and a height of 6. What is its area?
If 3 apples weigh 600 grams in total, how much does one apple weigh in grams?
A shop sells 25 items on Monday and twice as many on Tuesday. How many in total over the two days?
A 5-liter bottle fills at 250 ml per second. How many seconds does it take to fill?
The sum of three consecutive integers is 45. What is the largest of the three?
A bus has 52 seats and 39 are taken. How many seats are empty?
A recipe needs 2 eggs for 4 servings. How many eggs are needed for 10 servings?
A phone battery drops 8 percent per hour. After 5 hours, what is the total percent dropped?
A garden is 7 m by 9 m. What is its area in square meters?
You save 12 dollars a week. How much have you saved after 6 weeks, in dollars?
A train leaves at 14:00 and arrives at 17:30. How long is the trip in hours?
A number increased by 7 equals 23. What is the number?
A box weighs 4 kg. How much do 6 such boxes weigh in kg?
If 20 percent of a number is 16, what is the number?
A car uses 6 liters of fuel per 100 km. How many liters does it use for 250 km?
A clock shows 3:00. How many degrees are between the hour and minute hands?
Three friends split a 60 dollar bill equally. How much does each pay in dollars?
A wall is 3 m tall and 5 m wide. What is its area in square meters?
If a dozen eggs costs 3 dollars, how much do 36 eggs cost in dollars?
A runner completes 4 laps of a 400 m track. How many meters is that in total?
Double 18 and then subtract 6. What is the result?
A tank starts with 95 liters and loses 5 liters per day. How many liters remain after 3 days?
A rectangle has an area of 48 and a width of 6. What is its length?
There are 35 students and each needs 2 notebooks. How many notebooks are needed in total?
A sale takes 30 percent off a 50 dollar coat. What is the new price in dollars?
A pie chart slice is 25 percent of a full circle. How many degrees is that?
Sara is 12 years old and her brother is twice her age. How old is her brother?
A pack has 24 cans and you drink 3 per day. How many days does the pack last?
What is the average of 10, 20, and 30?
A 100 m race is run in 20 seconds. What is the speed in meters per second?
If 7 plus x equals 19, what is x?
A 36 m rope is cut into 4 equal pieces. How long is each piece in meters?
A store had 200 shirts and sold 35 percent of them. How many shirts were sold?
Five boxes hold 9 books each. How many books are there in total?
A 15 dollar meal includes a 20 percent tip. What is the total cost in dollars?
A wheel turns 3 times per second. How many turns does it make in one minute?
A worker packs 25 boxes per hour. How many boxes are packed in an 8-hour shift?
If 6 identical books cost 54 dollars, what is the cost of one book in dollars?
